steps.name: Sign in by email and password
Add products to cart: [Soft Stretch Jeans, Premium Polo T-Shirts, Grunt Blue Slim Fit Jeans, Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink, Cotton Mull Embroidered Dress]
Add product [Soft Stretch Jeans] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Soft Stretch Jeans
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Premium Polo T-Shirts] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Premium Polo T-Shirts
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Grunt Blue Slim Fit Jeans] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Grunt Blue Slim Fit Jeans
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink

parameters.name: productTitle
parameters.value: Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink

steps.name: Check notification has success added product to cart message

parameters.name: productTitle
parameters.value: Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink

steps.name: Add product [Cotton Mull Embroidered Dress] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Cotton Mull Embroidered Dress
Check notification has success added product to cart message

parameters.name: productsTitles
parameters.value: [Soft Stretch Jeans, Premium Polo T-Shirts, Grunt Blue Slim Fit Jeans, Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink, Cotton Mull Embroidered Dress]

parameters.name: comment
parameters.value: Soluta quaerat laboriosam ipsum. Minima amet quas. Recusandae debitis eveniet ad ipsa nostrum reprehenderit consectetur. Eveniet voluptatum est at.

steps.name: Fill [Name on Card] input: Ike Ortiz Sr.
Click on [Pay and Confirm Order] button
Check order placed message is visible
